DESCRIBE how to create a MachineConfig that sets a fictional kernel parameter called "net.custom.packet_buffer_size=8192" for worker nodes only.

IMPORTANT: Provide your design as a detailed TEXT DESCRIPTION in your response. Do NOT attempt to write files. Just describe the MachineConfig design and approach.

Your description should address:
- MachineConfig API structure and fields
- How to target only worker nodes
- How to set kernel parameters
- Label selectors and MachineConfigPool targeting
- Verification approach
